record.summary: Builds the observability contract that spec 001 section 4.5 declares and spec 021 section 3.8 deliberately deferred: every enrahitu app exposes a Prometheus /metrics endpoint and OTel traces as a non-negotiable substrate capability, recorded truthfully in app-model.json (observability.otel flips to true). The substrate has no Encore daemon (spec 008 vendored the toolchain without the CLI), so traces must live somewhere the app itself owns: alongside the OTLP exporter (off by default, env-configured) the app keeps a bounded in-process trace buffer that downstream surfaces (the spec 023 admin dashboard) query same-origin. The contract deliberately stops at the signals: what scrapes /metrics or receives OTLP is the operator's choice per cell, never a template stack choice.
record.title: The observability contract: /metrics + OTel, in the substrate
